infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo Cleanup needs access to your photo library to help you find and remove duplicate or similar photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Photo Cleanup needs permission to delete photos you choose to remove.
